'''Txer''' was a male [[Myneyrsh]] from [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]] and was the leader of the [[Free People]] who were fighting the [[Yuuzhan Vong]]. Txer found and aided [[Uldir Lochett]] in his search for [[Klin-Fa Gi]].
